H-OS-L1.name: Pebble
H-OS-L1.sphere: n=95, mean=7.15, std=1.78, confidence=strong. Overstimulation protocol with high organic discovery (site-driven n=26). 66% positive outcomes. YouTube: moderate reach (30 views) with unknown retention. AutoGluon predicted 6.859.
H-OS-L1.sphere_plain: Very effective for sensory overload - helps most people settle within 5-10 minutes of listening.

H-OS-L2.name: Rainfall
H-OS-L2.sphere: n=51, mean=6.92, std=1.73, confidence=strong. Overstimulation protocol with uniform sourcing. 65% positive outcomes. YouTube: low reach (5 views).
H-OS-L2.sphere_plain: Good for overstimulation relief, though it's still finding its audience.

H-OS-L3.name: Glacier
H-OS-L3.sphere: n=47, mean=7.04, std=1.68, confidence=meaningful. Overstimulation protocol with sleep-use alignment. 64% positive outcomes. YouTube: low reach (8 views).
H-OS-L3.sphere_plain: More intense sensory reset that works well, especially for sleep preparation.

H-AX-L1.name: Meadow
H-AX-L1.sphere: n=67, mean=7.22, std=1.93, confidence=strong. 63% positive outcomes with qualitative showing balanced calming effect. Advisor-driven responses (n=5) suggest clinical use. YouTube: low reach (7 views). AutoGluon predicted 7.838 for anxiety zone.
H-AX-L1.sphere_plain: Many find this anxiety protocol helpful, especially when used professionally. Most feel calmed within 10 minutes.

H-AX-L2.name: Cottage
H-AX-L2.sphere: n=48, mean=6.94, std=1.62, confidence=meaningful. 67% positive outcomes with qualitative revealing neutral music opinions clustering. YouTube: minimal reach (6 views). AutoGluon cross-bucket suggests similarity to X-MD-L1.
H-AX-L2.sphere_plain: A solid anxiety tool that works for most listeners, though some find the music neutral.

H-AX-L3.name: Valley
H-AX-L3.sphere: n=36, mean=7.08, std=1.89, confidence=meaningful. 61% positive outcomes with qualitative indicating very settling rhythm perception. YouTube: negligible reach (4 views).
H-AX-L3.sphere_plain: Higher-intensity anxiety support that delivers strong results for those who need deeper calming.

H-CR-L1.name: Anchor
H-CR-L1.sphere: n=43, mean=6.35, std=1.70, confidence=meaningful. Crisis protocol with expected floor — 53% positive outcomes. Qualitative shows significant improvement in acute distress scenarios. YouTube: low reach (6 views).
H-CR-L1.sphere_plain: Good for crisis moments - helps when everything feels overwhelming, with effects noticed within 5 minutes.

H-CR-L2.name: Harbor
H-CR-L2.sphere: n=33, mean=6.52, std=1.70, confidence=meaningful. Crisis protocol with polarized music opinions. Development signal to review adviser routing. YouTube: minimal reach (4 views).
H-CR-L2.sphere_plain: Another crisis intervention option that polarizes listeners - some love it, others find it neutral.

H-CR-L3.name: Horizon
H-CR-L3.sphere: n=27, mean=6.52, std=1.91, confidence=meaningful. Crisis protocol with notable 'not liked' opinions (n=4). YouTube: negligible reach (5 views).
H-CR-L3.sphere_plain: Best crisis protocol when intense support is needed, though some don't connect with the music style.

H-SL-L1.name: Lantern
H-SL-L1.sphere: n=54, mean=7.19, std=1.86, confidence=strong. Sleep protocol with caregiver focus (19%). 65% positive outcomes. AutoGluon predicted 7.539. YouTube: minimal reach (4 views).
H-SL-L1.sphere_plain: Well regarded by both personal users and caregivers supporting others' rest.

H-SL-L2.name: Hammock
H-SL-L2.sphere: n=45, mean=7.09, std=1.55, confidence=meaningful. Sleep protocol with high caregiver use (33%) and neutral music opinions. YouTube: low reach (5 views).
H-SL-L2.sphere_plain: Popular with caregivers but some have neutral music reactions - may need individual adaptation.

H-SL-L3.name: Midnight
H-SL-L3.sphere: n=28, mean=7.07, std=1.68, confidence=meaningful. Sleep protocol with slightly busy rhythm perceptions. 64% positive outcomes. YouTube: negligible reach (3 views).
H-SL-L3.sphere_plain: Good sleep support that works across different listener types, with gentle results.

T-FC-L1.name: Compass
T-FC-L1.sphere: n=41, mean=6.46, std=1.82, confidence=meaningful. Focus protocol with 'slightly busy' rhythm feedback. Development signal to refine rhythm complexity. YouTube: low reach (5 views).
T-FC-L1.sphere_plain: Focus aid that helps many concentrate, though some find the rhythm slightly busy.

T-FC-L2.name: Waypoint
T-FC-L2.sphere: n=32, mean=7.19, std=1.60, confidence=meaningful. Focus protocol with strong recovery from L1. YouTube: minimal reach (4 views).
T-FC-L2.sphere_plain: Solid protocol for improving concentration when you need to focus.

T-FC-L3.name: Summit
T-FC-L3.sphere: n=35, mean=7.63, std=1.97, confidence=meaningful. Focus protocol with bimodal hints but highest THRIVING mean. Qualitative confirms strong efficacy. YouTube: moderate reach (15 views).
T-FC-L3.sphere_plain: Strongly endorsed for focus tasks - many report significant clarity improvements.

T-CF-L1.name: Ember
T-CF-L1.sphere: n=34, mean=6.74, std=1.73, confidence=meaningful. Creative flow protocol with slight improvement dominance. Qualitative shows immediate settling. YouTube: minimal reach (2 views).
T-CF-L1.sphere_plain: Helps people get creative work done, starting to work within minutes.

T-CF-L2.name: Current
T-CF-L2.sphere: n=24, mean=6.79, std=1.41, confidence=meaningful. Creative flow protocol with strong L2 performance. YouTube: minimal reach (2 views).
T-CF-L2.sphere_plain: Good for getting in flow state, though it's still building its audience.

T-CF-L3.name: Aurora
T-CF-L3.sphere: n=18, mean=7.28, std=1.32, confidence=developing. Creative flow protocol with highest THRIVING mean. Qualitative shows neutral music opinions despite strong outcomes. YouTube: low reach (7 views).
T-CF-L3.sphere_plain: Most effective creative support in the library - many notice significant improvement.

T-MB-L1.name: Stone
T-MB-L1.sphere: n=25, mean=7.04, std=1.34, confidence=meaningful. Maintenance protocol with longest settle time cluster (20 min). YouTube: low reach (3 views).
T-MB-L1.sphere_plain: Helps maintain balance with steady support, especially during slower activities.

T-MB-L2.name: Axis
T-MB-L2.sphere: n=22, mean=6.68, std=2.03, confidence=meaningful. Maintenance protocol with 'slightly busy' rhythm patterns. YouTube: low reach (4 views).
T-MB-L2.sphere_plain: Level 2 maintenance protocol with steady but unspectacular results.

T-MB-L3.name: Orbit
T-MB-L3.sphere: n=14, mean=6.93, std=1.73, confidence=developing. Maintenance protocol with polarized outcomes and 'did not settle' reports. YouTube: negligible reach (3 views).
T-MB-L3.sphere_plain: Good for maintaining equilibrium, though some struggle to settle with it.

X-ME-L1.name: Breeze
X-ME-L1.sphere: n=39, mean=6.74, std=1.94, confidence=meaningful. Mood protocol with longest settle time (20 min cluster). AutoGluon cross-bucket recommends across all zones. YouTube: low reach (8 views).
X-ME-L1.sphere_plain: Good for improving mood when low, though it takes longer to show effects.

X-ME-L2.name: Sunrise
X-ME-L2.sphere: n=25, mean=6.76, std=1.71, confidence=meaningful. Mood protocol with highest 'loved it' music ratings. YouTube: moderate reach (8 views).
X-ME-L2.sphere_plain: Effective mood support that many love, with noticeable positive effects.

X-ME-L3.name: Updraft
X-ME-L3.sphere: n=18, mean=6.28, std=1.74, confidence=developing. Mood protocol with notable non-response reports (n=5). YouTube: low reach (4 views).
X-ME-L3.sphere_plain: Least effective energy protocol - some listeners notice no change.

X-MD-L1.name: Footpath
X-MD-L1.sphere: n=22, mean=6.36, std=2.01, confidence=meaningful. Motivation protocol with lowest positive percentage (45%). YouTube: low reach (5 views). AutoGluon predicts 7.876.
X-MD-L1.sphere_plain: Motivation aid that helps many get started, though it's still finding its optimal use cases.

X-MD-L2.name: Trail
X-MD-L2.sphere: n=14, mean=6.21, std=1.63, confidence=developing. Motivation protocol with expected TRANSFORMING outcome. YouTube: low reach (7 views).
X-MD-L2.sphere_plain: Level 2 motivation protocol with typical transforming series variability.

X-MD-L3.name: Switchback
X-MD-L3.sphere: n=13, mean=7.15, std=2.38, confidence=developing. Motivation protocol with highest level mean but wide variance. Development signal to investigate subgroup effects. YouTube: moderate reach (7 views).
X-MD-L3.sphere_plain: Most effective motivation variant that works strongly when you really need a boost.

X-MC-L1.name: Cavern
X-MC-L1.sphere: n=24, mean=6.75, std=1.62, confidence=meaningful. Mind clarity protocol with 'actually made things worse' reports (n=2). YouTube: low reach (8 views).
X-MC-L1.sphere_plain: Transforming protocol that helps clarify thinking for most listeners.

X-MC-L2.name: Starlight
X-MC-L2.sphere: n=16, mean=6.81, std=1.64, confidence=developing. Mind clarity protocol with strong very settling rhythm feedback. YouTube: moderate reach (12 views).
X-MC-L2.sphere_plain: Good for gaining mental clarity, especially when combined with study or relaxation.

X-MC-L3.name: Cosmos
X-MC-L3.sphere: n=10, mean=5.70, std=2.45, confidence=developing. Mind clarity protocol with bimodal distribution and adviser routing concerns. Anomaly suggests population split. YouTube: low reach (8 views).
X-MC-L3.sphere_plain: Ascending protocol with mixed results - works very well for some, not at all for others.

sphere_commentary.overview:
The dataset of 1000 outcome scores shows HEALING and THRIVING achieving nearly identical mean scores (6.98 vs 6.96), while TRANSFORMING underperforms with wider variance (mean=6.59, std=1.87).
• HEALING leads in consistency with tight std dev across protocols.
• THRIVING matches HEALING despite HOLD type design.
• TRANSFORMING shows expected ASCENT spread but requires subgroup investigation.
sphere_commentary.cross_series:
Series performance clearly reflects design intent.
• HEALING protocols show tight clustering around mean scores.
• THRIVING demonstrates robust cognitive optimization with standout focus protocols.
• TRANSFORMING variability suggests either design complexity or population mismatch.
sphere_commentary.anomalies:
Bimodal distribution in X-MC-L3 (n=10) suggests potential population split or volume-specific effect.
• H-CR-L2 shows unexpectedly low scores (mean=6.52, n=33) for crisis protocol — warranting protocol refinement.
• AutoGluon cross-bucket routing strongly favors X-ME-L1 across all zones — may indicate overfitting or genuine pharmacological advantage.
sphere_commentary.development_signals:
[CONVERGENT SIGNAL] H-CR-L2 needs adviser routing review and volume comparison (n=33, mean=6.52).
• Investigate listener type correlation with outcomes for X-MD-L3 (n=13, std=2.38).
• Optimize X-ME-L3 based on AutoGluon predicted score delta (6.28 vs 8.23 predicted).
• Refine T-FC-L1 rhythm complexity based on 'slightly busy' qualitative feedback.
sphere_commentary.embedding_analysis:
CROSS-RUN DRIFT shows analytical instability in ASCENT protocols (sim<0.7 for X-MD-L3, X-ME-L2).
• SEMANTIC CLUSTERS: insufficient data for cluster analysis.
• Embedding confidence low due to limited run history and few protocols with embeddings.
